item.title: Study finds immune markers at two months tied to longer survival in glioblastoma trial
item.description: Researchers at The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center have identified blood-based biomarkers that can help distinguish patients with gliobl...

item.title: Study finds addiction consults led to opioid treatment for eye infection patients
item.description: People who use injection drugs are at a higher risk for eye infections, particularly endogenous endophthalmitis—a medical emergency caused by bacteria...

item.title: Northern California reports first measles outbreak since 2020
item.description: California reported its first confirmed measles outbreak since 2020 on Feb. 10. The highly contagious disease infected 2,276 people nationwide in 2025...

item.title: Investigators study ivermectin's 'ability to kill cancer cells'
item.description: The National Cancer Institute, the federal research agency charged with leading the war against the nation's second-largest killer, is studying iverme...

item.title: Smokefree generation law could see English smoking prevalence drop below 5% decades earlier than expected
item.description: New research, led by experts at the University of Nottingham, has found that smoking prevalence among 12- to 30-year-olds in England could drop below ...
